SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery.models

Class AppNotification

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.models.AppNotification
public class AppNotification extends Object
Role: Data Model / Entity Purpose: Represents a system-generated alert or message sent to a user. It structures the data required for both in-app notification lists and push notifications delivered via Firebase Cloud Messaging. Design Pattern: Data Transfer Object (DTO). This class facilitates the mapping of Firestore documents into local Java objects. Encapsulates all data related to a user notification, including type, read status, and associated event details.

  • Constructor Details

    • AppNotification

      public AppNotification()
      Default constructor required for Firebase Firestore deserialization. Initializes createdAt to the current time and read status to false.

    • AppNotification

      public AppNotification(String userId, String eventId, String eventTitle, String type, String title, String message, boolean actionRequired)
      Constructs a new AppNotification with specified details.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique ID of the recipient user.
      eventId - The unique ID of the associated event.
      eventTitle - The display title of the associated event.
      type - The category of notification (e.g., TYPE_WIN).
      title - The headline to be displayed in the notification.
      message - The detailed body text of the notification.
      actionRequired - Whether the user is expected to respond to this notification.

  • Method Details

    • getRelativeTime

      public String getRelativeTime()
      Generates a relative time string based on the creation timestamp.
      Returns:
      A formatted string representing elapsed time (e.g., "5m", "2h", "1d").

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      The Firestore document ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Parameters:
      id - The Firestore document ID to set.

    • getUserId

      public String getUserId()
      Returns:
      The ID of the user this notification belongs to.

    • setUserId

      public void setUserId(String userId)
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the recipient user.

    • getEventId

      Returns:
      The unique ID of the associated event.

      Parameters:

      public String getEventTitle()
      Returns:
      The display title of the associated event.

    • setEventTitle

      public void setEventTitle(String t)
      Parameters:
      t - The display title of the associated event to set

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns:
      The notification type string.

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Parameters:
      type - The type (e.g., win, loss, invitation).

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      The notification title.

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Parameters:
      title - The headline to display.

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns:
      The body message.

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Parameters:
      message - The detailed description text.

    • isRead

      public boolean isRead()
      Returns:
      True if the notification has been viewed.

    • setRead

      public void setRead(boolean read)
      Parameters:
      read - The read status to set.

    • isActionRequired

      public boolean isActionRequired()
      Returns:
      True if the notification requires a user action.

    • setActionRequired

      public void setActionRequired(boolean v)
      Parameters:
      v - The action requirement status.

    • getCreatedAt

      public long getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      Epoch timestamp of creation.

    • setCreatedAt

      public void setCreatedAt(long createdAt)
      Parameters:
      createdAt - The creation timestamp.

    • getSenderName

      public String getSenderName()
      Returns:
      The name of the notification sender.

    • setSenderName

      public void setSenderName(String senderName)
      Parameters:
      senderName - The name to display as sender.

    • getRecipientCount

      public int getRecipientCount()
      Returns:
      The number of users who received this notification.

    • setRecipientCount

      public void setRecipientCount(int recipientCount)
      Parameters:
      recipientCount - The total count of recipients.
